name: release-approval
description: Run deterministic role-bound release approval scans, page setup, and hourly automation installation.

interface.longDescription: Validate frozen release request machine blocks, create or reuse one durable local approval page, retry unsent role decisions, and install a single hourly run_once automation without per-call config overrides.
defaultPrompt: Install the hourly release approval automation and execute the first run_once immediately.
Run release_approval_run_once and list pending approvals.
Open the existing release approval page for a pending event.
